| I’m so excited with how this visualization of [Notes on China](https://substack.com/redirect/e1dc8a4d-7a8c-436c-ae2f-b5d1cfbb0c36?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o) turned out.
